title: you died lololowka
description:
Changes the death message for the mod (You died).
Makes it look like a death message like in the Heart of the Universe season
body:
# Required mod for resource pack [You Died](https://modrinth.com/mod/you-died)
The resource pack changes the text from the You died mod to the text style as in the Lololoshka Heart of the Universe Story season.Additionally, the resource pack has English text support
This resource pack is based on another resource pack called [Heart of Universe GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/heart-of-universe-gui) by [f_gav](https://modrinth.com/user/f_gav)

In addition to textures, the resource pack also adds the sound of death.
## Death screen
![Death](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CbnP2BHp/images/ad157ce4c7678c94edf110a787a0dd30f1bfe221.png)
